description: The Albanese are a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cittanova and Laureana di Borrello, Calabria. They have branches in Brescia, Tuscany, Lazio, and Liguria. Their activities include drug trafficking, grape market control, and past kidnappings. They are allied with the Raso-Gullace clan and have been involved in feuds with other clans.

country_links.context: The organization has real estate investments in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: investimenti immobiliari in Francia ( Costa Azzurra )
country_links.context: The organization has real estate investments in France (Côte d'Azur).
